findings.evidence: `ComoduleCat.lean:333-338` only assigns `hom`, `inv`, `hom_inv_id`, and `inv_hom_id`; Mathlib already defines these fields for `CategoryTheory.Iso` in `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Iso.lean:53-62`.
findings.fix: Delete `isoOfHomInv` and construct the isomorphism in `isoOfLinearEquiv` directly with an `Iso` structure literal or `Iso.mk`.
findings.issue: `ComoduleCat.isoOfHomInv` has no comodule-specific content; it is just the generic `CategoryTheory.Iso` constructor specialized to `ComoduleCat`, creating duplicated and misleading API.

summary: Most of the comodule isomorphism API is in the natural base `ComoduleCat` file with direct imports, but one new declaration is generic category API duplicated under a comodule-specific name.
